# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.403 — State and Federal Judges

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for a current or visiting state or federal judge. The license plates must include the words “State Judge” or “U.S. Judge,” as appropriate.

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290, Sec. 44(a)(4), eff. September 1, 2011.

(c) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290, Sec. 44(a)(4), eff. September 1, 2011.

(d) In this section:

    (1) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290, Sec. 44(a)(4), eff. September 1, 2011.

    (2) “State judge” means:

        (A) a justice of the supreme court;

        (B) a judge of the court of criminal appeals;

        (C) a judge of a court of appeals of this state;

        (D) a district court judge;

        (E) a presiding judge of an administrative judicial district; or

        (F) a statutory county court judge.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 247(13), eff. January 1, 2012.*
